lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹੁ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਡਾਰਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karahu anugrahu suaamee mere man te kabahu na ddaarau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Be Merciful to me, O my Lord and Master, that I might never forsake them from my mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਲਾਈ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਬਿਖੁ ਜਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo dhoor laaee mukh masatak kaam krodh bikh jaarau |
lines.english: Applying the dust of the feet of the Holy to my face and forehead, I burn away the poison of sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਨੀਚੁ ਆਤਮ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਉ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਇਹੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਧਾਰਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh te neech aatam kar maanau man meh ihu sukh dhaarau |1|
lines.english: I judge myself to be the lowest of all; in this way, I instill peace within my mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਕਲਮਲ ਸਗਲੇ ਝਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavah tthaakur abinaasee kalamal sagale jhaarau |
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Imperishable Lord and Master, and I shake off all my sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਨੁ ਪਾਵਉ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਉ ॥੨॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan naanak daan paavau kantth laae ur dhaarau |2|19|
lines.english: I have found the gift of the treasure of the Naam, O Nanak; I hug it close, and enshrine it in my heart. ||2||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਪੇਖਉ ਦਰਸੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jeeo pekhau daras tumaaraa |
lines.english: Dear God, I long to behold the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਾਰੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨੀ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਤੇ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sundar dhiaan dhaar din rainee jeea praan te piaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cherish this beautiful meditation day and night; You are dearer to me than my soul, dearer than life itself. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਅਵਿਲੋਕੇ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saasatr bed puraan aviloke simrit tat beechaaraa |
lines.english: I have studied and contemplated the essence of the Shaastras, the Vedas and the Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਭਗਤ ਜਨ ਸੇਵਕ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਬਿਖੈ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad bhagat jan sevak taa kee bikhai adhaaraa |
lines.english: Since the very beginning, and throughout the ages, the humble devotees have been Your servants; in the midst of the world of corruption, You are their Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਵਜਲ ਉਧਰਨਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deenaa naath praanapat pooran bhavajal udharanahaaraa |1|
lines.english: Protector of the meek, Lord of the breath of life, O Perfect One, carry us across the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਬਾਛੈ ਨਿਤ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਦੇਵਨਹਾਰਾ ॥੨॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: tin jan kee dhoor baachhai nit naanak paramesar devanahaaraa |2|20|
lines.english: Nanak longs for the dust of the feet of such humble beings; the Transcendent Lord is the Giver of all. ||2||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਜਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਣਿ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: teraa jan raam rasaaein maataa |
lines.english: Your humble servant, O Lord, is intoxicated with Your sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਉਪਜੀ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਜਾਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prem rasaa nidh jaa kau upajee chhodd na katahoo jaataa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who obtains the treasure of the Nectar of Your Love, does not renounce it to go somewhere else. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਮਜਨੁ ਕੀਨੋ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰੀ ਨਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath majan keeno saadhoo dhooree naataa |1|
lines.english: Bathing in the dust of the feet of the Holy is equal to taking cleansing baths at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਠਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਵਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਖਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: baitthat har har sovat har har har ras bhojan khaataa |
lines.english: While sitting, he repeats the Lord's Name, Har, Har; while sleeping, he repeats the Lord's Name, Har, Har; he eats the Nectar of the Lord's Name as his food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਨੋ ਸਉਤੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam har jan kaa upajiaa jin keeno saut bidhaataa |
lines.english: How fruitful is the birth of the Lord's humble servant; the Creator is his Father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਸਮੂਹ ਲੈ ਉਧਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥੨॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: sagal samooh lai udhare naanak pooran braham pachhaataa |2|21|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who recognizes the Perfect Lord God, takes all with him, and saves everyone. ||2||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: maaee gur bin giaan na paaeeai |
lines.english: O mother, without the Guru, spiritual wisdom is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰ ਫਿਰਤ ਬਿਲਲਾਤੇ ਮਿਲਤ ਨਹੀ ਗੋਸਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik prakaar firat bilalaate milat nahee gosaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They wander around, weeping and crying out in various ways, but the Lord of the World does not meet them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਰੋਗ ਸੋਗ ਤਨੁ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਰਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: moh rog sog tan baadhio bahu jonee bharamaaeeai |
lines.english: The body is tied up with emotional attachment, disease and sorrow, and so it is lured into countless reincarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਿਕਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਜਾਇ ਰੂਆਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ttikan na paavai bin satasangat kis aagai jaae rooaaeeai |1|
lines.english: He finds no place of rest without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; to whom should he go and cry? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੈ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਧ ਚਰਨ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: karai anugrahu suaamee meraa saadh charan chit laaeeai |
lines.english: When my Lord and Master shows His Mercy, we lovingly focus our consciousness on the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਕਟ ਘੋਰ ਕਟੇ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੨॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: sankatt ghor katte khin bheetar naanak har daras samaaeeai |2|22|
lines.english: The most horrible agonies are dispelled in an instant, O Nanak, and we merge in the Blessed Vision of the Lord. ||2||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਈ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਅਨੰਦ ਰੂਪ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਉਬਰੇ ਬਾਲ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhee kaliaan anand roop hoee hai ubare baal gupaal | rahaau |
lines.english: I have been emancipated, and I have become the embodiment of bliss; I am the Lord's child - He has saved me. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹੋਏ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur hoe aap deaal |
lines.english: The Lord and Master Himself has become Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਇ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਕਰੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: due kar jorr karee benantee paarabraham man dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: With my palms pressed together, I offer my prayer; within my mind, I meditate on the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥੁ ਦੇਇ ਰਾਖੇ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਿ ਸਗਲਾ ਦੁਰਤੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haath dee raakhe paramesur sagalaa durat mittaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Giving me His hand, the Transcendent Lord has eradicated all my sins. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਜੋ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਰੇ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jan kau bal jaaeeai jo sabhanaa kare udhaar |2|23|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the humble servant of the Lord, who emancipates everyone. ||2||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰ ਨਾਰੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਇਆ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕਾ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: var naaree mil mangal gaaeaa tthaakur kaa jaikaar |
lines.english: Husband and wife join together in rejoicing, celebrating the Victory of the Lord Master.
